---
name: Feature request
about: Something other than a new lint rule — CLI flags, output formats, config, etc.
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

**What's missing or awkward**

Describe the gap. If it's about an existing rule being too strict/loose or
misconfigurable, prefer filing that as a bug report against that rule
instead.

**Proposed behavior**

What you'd want to happen instead. A sketch of the CLI invocation or config
shape helps.

**Why this belongs in clean-code**

clean-code is intentionally narrow (deterministic `ast`-based checks, no
LLM calls, fixes an LLM/human can act on). A quick note on how this fits
that scope helps triage.
